name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Cash America Pawn, now part of FirstCash Holdings, is a national pawn chain offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, and used merchandise retail at 3,300+ locations.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn operates under FirstCash Holdings, Inc., a publicly traded company headquartered at 1600 West 7th Street, Fort Worth, Texas. FirstCash acquired Cash America International in 2016, creating the largest pawn operator in the United States. The combined company is a component of both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index, and employs approximately 22,000 people across its U.S., Latin American, and United Kingdom operations — a scale that distinguishes it from every other pawn chain in the country.

At its core, Cash America Pawn locations make small, non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property. No credit check is required, and defaulting on the loan results only in forfeiture of the pledged item — there is no debt collection, no court judgment, and no negative credit reporting. The stores buy and sell a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. The chain purchases gold, silver, and platinum for immediate cash. A layaway service lets customers reserve items with as little as 10% down. Through its wholly owned subsidiary AFF, FirstCash also provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through a network of over 15,000 active retail merchant partner locations nationwide.

With more than 3,300 store locations spanning 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador, FirstCash operates at a geographic scale unmatched by any other pawn operator globally. This footprint gives consumers broad access to collateral-based credit that requires no income verification, no credit history, and no bank account. As a publicly traded, institutionally scrutinized company, it is subject to regulatory oversight and financial disclosure requirements that independent pawn shops are not.

Pawn shops serve a genuine need for consumers who own items of value but lack access to conventional credit. The non-recourse structure is genuinely borrower-friendly in one respect — you cannot be sued or sent to collections. However, pawn loan interest rates and fee structures are not disclosed on the FirstCash website, and rates vary significantly by state regulation. Loan amounts are pegged to the pawn shop's own conservative appraisal of your collateral, which is typically well below market resale value. Consumers should treat pawn loans as a short-term cash solution of last resort and compare rates to alternatives like credit union payday alternative loans or zero-fee cash advance apps before pledging personal property.
address: 5445 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

company_info.headquarters: 5445 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

pros: 3,300+ store locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America — widest pawn network in the world
Non-recourse loans: no credit check, no debt collection, no credit score impact if you forfeit the item
Buys gold, silver, and platinum on the spot for immediate cash
Layaway available with just 10% down payment on in-store merchandise
Accepts a broad range of collateral: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
AFF subsidiary provides lease-to-own financing at 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide
Publicly traded with institutional oversight (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) — greater accountability than independent pawn shops
cons: Pawn loan interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed on the website — consumers must visit a store to learn actual costs
Collateral appraisals are set conservatively by the store, so loan amounts are typically a fraction of the item's resale value
Borrowers permanently lose their pledged item if they cannot repay on time
No digital or online loan application — all transactions require in-person store visits
Lease-to-own products through AFF can carry high total cost of ownership compared to direct purchase financing
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash without a credit check and own jewelry, electronics, or tools of value
People looking to sell gold, silver, or platinum for immediate payment
Bargain hunters seeking used electronics, instruments, or sporting goods at below-retail prices
Consumers who have been declined by banks or credit unions and need a non-recourse short-term loan
diagnosis: Cash America Pawn is best suited for credit-invisible or credit-constrained consumers who own tangible assets and need immediate cash without any credit application or income verification. The main caveat is that pawn loan rates are opaque until you visit a store, loan amounts are set conservatively relative to item value, and borrowers who cannot repay lose their property permanently — making this a high-cost last resort rather than a primary borrowing strategy.
services: Pawn loans (non-recourse, secured by personal property)
Gold, silver, and platinum purchasing for immediate cash
Used jewelry buying and retail resale
Used electronics buying and retail resale
Tools and appliances buying and retail resale
Sporting goods buying and retail resale
Musical instruments buying and retail resale
Retail finance payment solutions at merchant partner locations (through AFF)
Store locator for nearest Cash America / FirstCash branch
